ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Final Account And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Final Account And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Continued To May-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Stecher for Sheldon Rosenthal.

Mr. Stecher stated that the ancillary proceeding in Illinois was still going on, that he had spoken with the personal representative, that he was informed that they had entered into an arrangement to sell the property, and that they would need to wait six months for any creditor's claims. In addition, he informed the Court that an account through July had been filed. The Court contined the matter to May 13, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. for status on the filing of the final accounting, and stated that the extraordinary fees would be dealt with at that time. The statutory fees were taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
